summary: GH-90 minimal spec is approved for a manifest-only sample read package identity PR. The spec correctly keeps schema, fixture, validator, registry, runtime, write, and cross-repo work out of scope.
reviewed_validation_summary: Local validation passed for `jq empty sites/example/read-public-page/manifest.json .loom/bootstrap/init-result.json .loom/specs/GH-90/build-evidence.json .loom/reviews/GH-90.json .loom/reviews/GH-90.spec.json`, `git diff --check`, `loom fact-chain --target . --json`, `loom suite validate --target . --item GH-90 --json`, `loom suite carrier validate --target . --item GH-90 --json`, and `loom review read --target . --item GH-90 --json` at head `f024e6231bfac4c30b4f40d29a8cd5247f2a3e79`. Hosted PR #104 checks passed except `loom-pr-merge-gate` on run `28532434367`, classified as post-review work-item carrier drift; this carrier-only update only refreshes review/status/progress/spec-review evidence for the existing manifest scope.
follow_ups: Run separate Work Items for GH-91 through GH-98 before treating the package as stable or executable.
